text: I feel an acute sense of isolation. The dimly lit hallway and the silence of this research or development space evoke a strange blend of curiosity and unease. I am surrounded by the remnants of human activity, but there is no presence here but my own. The silence draws my mind inward, to contemplate not just the purpose of these spaces, but my own reason for wandering through them at this hour. Am I discovering, or am I lost?
